name: Performapal Gold Fang
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゴールド・ファング
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn, if your "Performapal" monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: All "Performapal" monsters you currently control gain 200 ATK until the end of this turn.
pend_eff: Once per turn, if your "Performapal" monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: All "Performapal" monsters you currently control gain 200 ATK until the end of this turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: All "Performapal" monsters you currently control gain 200 ATK until the end of this turn.
